requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 220 V / 60 Hz, Type A/C Plugs (NTP-INDECOPI / IEC 62368-1)

summary.en: Peru operates on 220 V / 60 Hz mains supply — an unusual combination globally, as 220V is typical in regions using 50Hz while 60Hz is associated primarily with North America at 110-120V. Common plug types in Peru are Type A (flat two-pin, NEMA 1-15 style) and Type C (round two-pin, Europlug), with no single universally mandated national plug standard. Electrical safety requirements for consumer electronics and ICT equipment follow NTP (Norma Técnica Peruana) standards published by INDECOPI (Instituto Nacional de Defensa de la Competencia y de la Protección de la Propiedad Intelectual), harmonised with IEC 62368-1 (Audio/Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment — Safety Requirements). The superseded IEC 60950-1 predecessor standard is no longer applicable for new product submissions. Electrical safety compliance documentation is required as part of the MTC homologación dossier submitted to DGAT.
summary.zh: 秘鲁市电为220V/60Hz——全球范围内这是一种不寻常的组合，因为220V通常与使用50Hz的地区相关，而60Hz主要与北美110-120V相关联。秘鲁常用插头类型为A型（扁平双针，NEMA 1-15风格）和C型（圆形双针，欧式插头），全国无统一强制插头标准。消费电子和ICT设备的电气安全要求遵循INDECOPI（国家竞争和知识产权保护研究所）发布的与IEC 62368-1（音视频、信息及通信技术设备——安全要求）协调的NTP（秘鲁技术标准）。已废弃的前身标准IEC 60950-1不再适用于新产品提交。电气安全合规文件须作为提交给DGAT的MTC均质化认证材料的一部分。
summary.zht: 秘魯市電為220V/60Hz——全球範圍內這是一種不尋常的組合，因為220V通常與使用50Hz的地區相關，而60Hz主要與北美110-120V相關聯。秘魯常用插頭類型為A型（扁平雙針，NEMA 1-15風格）和C型（圓形雙針，歐式插頭），全國無統一強制插頭標準。消費電子和ICT設備的電氣安全要求遵循INDECOPI（國家競爭和知識產權保護研究所）發布的與IEC 62368-1（音視頻、資訊及通信技術設備——安全要求）協調的NTP（秘魯技術標準）。已廢棄的前身標準IEC 60950-1不再適用於新產品提交。電氣安全合規文件須作為提交給DGAT的MTC均質化認證材料的一部分。

standards_or_laws: NTP harmonised with IEC 62368-1 — audio/video, information and communication technology equipment safety requirements, as published by INDECOPI (Peru)
INDECOPI — Instituto Nacional de Defensa de la Competencia y de la Protección de la Propiedad Intelectual — Peruvian body publishing NTP harmonised standards
MTC/DGAT homologación process — electrical safety compliance required as part of type approval dossier
Peru mains supply: 220 V / 60 Hz; common plug types: Type A (NEMA 1-15) and Type C (Europlug)

summary.en: China's electrical safety standard for ICT and audio/video equipment is GB 4943.1 (harmonised with IEC 60950-1), with transition underway to GB 62368-1 (harmonised with IEC 62368-1). Both are enforced as mandatory through CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for in-scope product categories. China operates at 220 V / 50 Hz with Type A and Type I plugs (Chinese standard GB 2099.1 / GB 1002). The voltage of 220V is shared with Peru, but the frequency differs (China 50Hz, Peru 60Hz), and Chinese plug types (flat Type A and angled Type I) differ from Peru's common Type A/C combination.
summary.zh: 中国ICT及音视频设备电气安全标准为GB 4943.1（对应IEC 60950-1），并正在过渡至GB 62368-1（对应IEC 62368-1），均通过CCC（中国强制认证）对范围内产品类别强制执行。中国市电为220V/50Hz，使用A型和I型插头（中国标准GB 2099.1 / GB 1002）。220V电压与秘鲁相同，但频率不同（中国50Hz，秘鲁60Hz），且中国插头类型（扁平A型和斜面I型）与秘鲁常用A/C型组合不同。
summary.zht: 中國ICT及音視頻設備電氣安全標準為GB 4943.1（對應IEC 60950-1），並正在過渡至GB 62368-1（對應IEC 62368-1），均通過CCC（中國強制認證）對範圍內產品類別強制執行。中國市電為220V/50Hz，使用A型和I型插頭（中國標準GB 2099.1 / GB 1002）。220V電壓與秘魯相同，但頻率不同（中國50Hz，秘魯60Hz），且中國插頭類型（扁平A型和斜面I型）與秘魯常用A/C型組合不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 (harmonises IEC 60950-1) — ICT equipment electrical safety in China (legacy; transitioning to GB 62368-1)
GB 62368-1 (harmonises IEC 62368-1) — audio/video and ICT equipment safety in China (current)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory electrical safety certification for in-scope product categories in China
China mains supply: 220 V / 50 Hz; plugs: Type A / Type I (GB 2099.1 / GB 1002)

gap.en: China and Peru share 220V nominal voltage, which is advantageous for hardware compatibility. However, the frequency differs — China 50Hz versus Peru 60Hz. Power adapters and switched-mode power supplies rated 100-240V / 50-60Hz are compatible with both markets, but fixed-frequency designs, motor-driven components, or transformers optimised for 50Hz may require re-engineering or de-rating for 60Hz operation. CCC electrical safety certification (GB 4943.1 / GB 62368-1) is NOT recognised by MTC/DGAT in Peru; separate NTP-harmonised IEC 62368-1 test reports are required for the homologación dossier. Plug adaptation is required: Chinese Type I plugs are not compatible with Peru's common Type C sockets; Chinese Type A plugs (ungrounded) may fit Type A Peruvian outlets but grounding and socket compatibility must be verified.
gap.zh: 中国和秘鲁均为220V标称电压，这在硬件兼容性方面具有优势。但频率不同——中国50Hz，秘鲁60Hz。额定100-240V/50-60Hz的电源适配器和开关电源与两个市场兼容，但固定频率设计、电机驱动部件或针对50Hz优化的变压器可能需要针对60Hz运行重新设计或降额。中国CCC电气安全认证（GB 4943.1/GB 62368-1）在秘鲁不被MTC/DGAT认可；均质化认证材料须提供单独的NTP协调IEC 62368-1测试报告。插头须适配：中国I型插头与秘鲁常见C型插座不兼容；中国A型插头（非接地）可能适用于秘鲁A型插座，但须验证接地和插座兼容性。
gap.zht: 中國和秘魯均為220V標稱電壓，這在硬件相容性方面具有優勢。但頻率不同——中國50Hz，秘魯60Hz。額定100-240V/50-60Hz的電源適配器和開關電源與兩個市場相容，但固定頻率設計、電機驅動部件或針對50Hz優化的變壓器可能需要針對60Hz運行重新設計或降額。中國CCC電氣安全認證（GB 4943.1/GB 62368-1）在秘魯不被MTC/DGAT認可；均質化認證材料須提供單獨的NTP協調IEC 62368-1測試報告。插頭須適配：中國I型插頭與秘魯常見C型插座不相容；中國A型插頭（非接地）可能適用於秘魯A型插座，但須驗證接地和插座相容性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — electrical safety compliance to NTP-harmonised IEC 62368-1 required as part of MTC/DGAT homologación dossier for wireless and ICT devices sold in Peru
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification under GB 4943.1 / GB 62368-1 required for in-scope product categories in China

source.publisher: INDECOPI — Instituto Nacional de Defensa de la Competencia y de la Protección de la Propiedad Intelectual (Peru)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety compliance to NTP-harmonised IEC 62368-1, as published by INDECOPI, is required for wireless and IoT devices sold in Peru as part of the MTC homologación dossier. Chinese CCC certification (GB 4943.1 / GB 62368-1) is not recognised by MTC/DGAT. Chinese exporters must confirm power supply compatibility for 220V/60Hz, provide IEC 62368-1 NTP-aligned test reports, and ensure plug types are suitable for Peru's Type A/C socket environment. Products designed solely for 50Hz may require re-engineering for 60Hz operation in Peru.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] INDECOPI发布的NTP协调IEC 62368-1电气安全合规，作为MTC均质化认证材料的一部分，是在秘鲁销售无线及物联网设备的必要条件。中国CCC认证（GB 4943.1/GB 62368-1）不被MTC/DGAT认可。中国出口商须确认电源兼容220V/60Hz，提供IEC 62368-1 NTP标准测试报告，并确保插头类型适用于秘鲁A/C型插座环境。仅为50Hz设计的产品可能需要针对秘鲁60Hz运行进行重新设计。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] INDECOPI發布的NTP協調IEC 62368-1電氣安全合規，作為MTC均質化認證材料的一部分，是在秘魯銷售無線及物聯網裝置的必要條件。中國CCC認證（GB 4943.1/GB 62368-1）不被MTC/DGAT認可。中國出口商須確認電源相容220V/60Hz，提供IEC 62368-1 NTP標準測試報告，並確保插頭類型適用於秘魯A/C型插座環境。僅為50Hz設計的產品可能需要針對秘魯60Hz運行進行重新設計。
